title: senecio calthifolius
intro: Senecio calthifolius, also known as the Cabbage Leaves Senna, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, Senecio calthifolius has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for various skin conditions. Senecio calthifolius can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
